title: YTP: The Curious Case of Bayonetta's Butt
description:
In this video, Carcar Marmar treats us to a history lesson with his good friend Marmar Carcar about how Carlos Marlos vanquished the dreaded Marlos Carlos.


The source is The Infographics Show and their episode on the M14 Rifle. It was a fun source to splice and the mixing is some of my best. However, it was tough to turn the visuals of the source material into anything substantial, so I blurred them and stacked some of my own on top. I felt it was better than just having random chopped bits of the source as the sole visuals. At least I got approval from Marlos Carlos to use his liking.


If you loved this, subscribe for more and if you want to support me on Patreon, do so here:
- https://www.patreon.com/Captpan6

And you can also follow me on my socials for all sorts of other cool stuff!
